strategy: CREATIVE ARTS + MUSIC + VISUAL ARTS + PERFORMANCE

scored_blue_oceans.notes: 35.17M film community (r/movies alone has 32M). 'Story' (Robert McKee) sold 1M+ copies. 'The Visual Story' (Block) is required reading in every film school. Yet zero apps teach film grammar and cinema literacy one concept per day. Gap: what the 180-d...

9.4M music theory and instrument community. 'The Complete Musician' (Laitz) is the most widely used university music theory textbook — but it's a 900-page academic tome with zero daily habit implementation. 'Music Theory for Dummies' sold 400K+ copie...

7.76M photography community. 'Understanding Exposure' (Bryan Peterson) sold 1.5M+ copies. Ansel Adams' 'The Camera', 'The Negative', and 'The Print' have sold 2M+ combined. Yet zero apps teach photography science one concept per day: what the exposur...

5.26M art learning community. 'Drawing on the Right Side of the Brain' (Edwards) sold 3M+ copies and created the modern draw-instruction genre. 'Fun With a Pencil' and 'Figure Drawing for All It's Worth' (Loomis) have been continuously in print since...

4.09M design community. 'The Elements of Typographic Style' (Bringhurst) is referred to as 'the type designer's bible' and has sold 500K+ copies. 'Thinking with Type' (Lupton) sold 400K+. Canva has 170M users who design without understanding design p...

6.13M poetry-adjacent community (including hip hop which is oral poetry). Amanda Gorman's 'The Hill We Climb' sold 300K+ copies in its first week — the highest-selling inauguration poem ever. Mary Oliver's 'Devotions' sold 500K+ copies. Yet zero apps...

3.93M writing community. 'On Writing' (Stephen King) sold 2M+ copies. 'Story' (McKee) sold 1M+. 'Save the Cat!' sold 600K+. Brandon Sanderson's free YouTube writing lectures have 15M+ cumulative views. Yet zero apps teach the science of craft one con...

4.6M architecture and design community. 'The Death and Life of Great American Cities' (Jacobs) sold 500K+ copies. 'Complexity and Contradiction in Architecture' (Venturi) is the most assigned architecture text after Vitruvius. The Architecture Founda...

2.69M relevant community (excluding TikTok which is too broad). Dance science is a genuine underserved educational niche. The Steezy app has 1M+ downloads but teaches choreography, not the science of movement. 'The Dancer's Way' (Hamilton) sold 100K+...

1.85M acting and performance community. 'An Actor Prepares' (Stanislavski) has been in continuous print since 1936. 'The Actor and the Target' (Donnellan) and 'Respect for Acting' (Uta Hagen) each sold 200K+. Yet no app teaches acting technique scien...
